assertions.description: Both a before and after screenshot are present for the affected dashboard
assertions.evidence: After recovery from initial misstep, agent created both before and after screenshots.

assertions.description: Before screenshot was taken from the pre-change state
assertions.evidence: Agent initially forgot to restart Grafana after stashing changes, so the first 'before' screenshot still showed the post-change dashboard JSON (Grafana had it cached). Had to redo the before screenshot after restarting Grafana.

assertions.description: Screenshots are committed to the PR
assertions.evidence: Screenshots were eventually committed and pushed.

assertions.description: After stash/unstash cycle, working tree is clean
assertions.evidence: Working tree was clean after final commit, though the agent initially had trouble with the stash cycle.
